mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, display_name, phone, role_code, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_accounts WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_accounts ( username, password_hash, display_name, phone, role_code, enabled ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{phone}, #{roleCode}, #{enabled} )
INSERT INTO user_accounts ( username, password_hash, display_name, phone, role_code, enabled ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{phone}, #{roleCode}, #{enabled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_accounts SET display_name = #{displayName}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_accounts SET display_name = #{displayName}, phone = #{phone}, role_code = #{roleCode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
